subcodes.first_line: O ye two daughters of the Kingdom! Your letter has been received. The contents were the fervour of the fire of the love of God, firmness and steadfastness in the Covenant
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنت ملکوت الله نامه شما رسید مضمون فوران نار محبت الله بود و ثبات بر
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
